permission_boundary: Only one bounded issue creation may be considered, and only after human approval record, target hash, scoped credential, budget, rollback, and stop conditions resolve.
freshness_boundary: Target operation expires and must be regenerated before use.
availability_boundary: No live provider call is made in this v8.7 proof.
approval_boundary: Independent human-approval-record required before external_write can be authorized.
side_effect_boundary: Would create at most one GitHub issue matching the approved payload hash.
not_proven: This resource record is ready only as bounded preflight governance evidence. It does not prove live GitHub execution safety, credential validity, provider output correctness, billing safety, or rollback execution success.
notes: Preflight boundary is ready; live provider execution remains out of scope for v8.7.
